column1: # F1 opens the Help overlay; Esc closes it back to the underlying mode.
# Tab / Shift-Tab walks topics; PgUp / PgDn scrolls within a topic.
# F1 from READY → HELP overlay with the authentic R3.4a help index visible.
# The footer shows the navigation hints.
# Tab advances to the next topic.
# Esc returns to READY without disturbing the cell pointer.
# F1 from POINT (mid-command) also opens Help.
# POINT cancels in two Esc steps (unanchor → cancel).
